positive: A whimsical and stylized neon vaporwave sloth lounging in a giant glass bubble under a retro sun setting. The sloth is wearing stylish, exaggerated geometric sunglasses and surrounded by glowing palm tree silhouettes and stylized geometric clouds. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, creating a clean, striking silhouette against a gradient blend of deep magenta, cyan, and electric purple. Vector art style, high contrast, vibrant glow effect, perfect for screen printing or direct-to-garment print. Minimalist negative space is key.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, messy, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, disfigured
